title: Nourishend
description: A Lightweight expansion for the end dimension, allowing survivability. Legacy version of Enlightend.
body:
A legacy remake of old Enlightend, made into a lightweight expansion for the end dimension, allowing players to survive and thrive without overloading the end with new content. 

 

 

Features :

  • New bamboo-like plant that allows for wood gathering in the end
  • Gelatide Bulbs, a new plant that grows up big melon bulbs allowing for renewable food in the end.
  • Chorus jelly, a new food made with sugar and chorus fruit that applies a new effect
  • End stone dust that allows for flint gathering in the end
  • Nullstone that allows for stone crafting in the end
  • End iron ore that allows for iron in the end
  • New decorative blocks and 2 new potion effects

 

fully compatible with enlightend
